name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Swift Title Loans offers car title loans from $100–$50,000 with same-day funding in Memphis, TN. Bad credit and past bankruptcies are welcomed.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans operates a physical location at 1473 S Trezevant St in Memphis, Tennessee, serving customers who need emergency cash quickly. The company specializes in car title loans—a form of secured lending where borrowers pledge their vehicle title as collateral to receive funds. Their marketing emphasizes speed (sign up by noon, get cash today) and inclusivity (bad credit and past bankruptcies welcome), positioning themselves as accessible to consumers with damaged credit histories.

The company offers loan amounts ranging from $100 to $2,000 for quick emergency needs, with larger loans up to $50,000 available for those who qualify. They provide online application options and maintain a physical office with extended hours (Mon–Fri 9am–7pm, Sat 10am–5pm). Their website highlights 256-bit SSL and TLS security, suggesting encrypted data handling. The stated process allows customers to borrow against their vehicle while retaining use of the car, with the title returned upon loan repayment.

Swift Title Loans distinguishes itself through personalized service, with multiple reviews mentioning "Alfred" by name as a patient, professional loan officer who explains terms clearly. Customer feedback indicates competitive rates compared to regional finance options and a welcoming office atmosphere. The company accepts applications from people with no collateral (personal loans), bad credit, and previous bankruptcies—demographics typically rejected by traditional lenders. Reviews consistently praise transparency and straightforward processes without confusing terminology.

However, there are honest limitations: the company operates only during business hours with no Sunday availability, parking can be crowded, and the office lacks some customer amenities (refreshments, better signage, improved lighting). While reviews are positive, they are all dated 8–10 months prior and appear concentrated, which should be noted when assessing recency and authenticity. As a title loan provider, this company operates in a high-risk lending category with interest rates and terms not disclosed on the public website, making full cost assessment impossible from available information.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding available with noon sign-up deadline
Loan amounts range from $100–$50,000 to accommodate various emergency and larger needs
Accepts applicants with bad credit, past bankruptcies, and no collateral (personal loan options)
Customers retain use of vehicle while borrowing against title
Named staff member (Alfred) consistently praised for patient explanations and personalized service
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm Mon–Fri) and Saturday availability (10am–5pm)
Website features 256-bit SSL and TLS security encryption for data protection
cons: No interest rates or APR disclosed on website, making cost comparison impossible
Limited hours (closed Sundays, no evening appointments after 7pm)
Crowded parking lot reported by customers
Physical office-dependent process; online application available but in-person visit likely required
No payment plan diversity or mobile app for account management per customer feedback
best_for: Consumers with bad credit or past bankruptcies needing $100–$2,000 emergency cash
Vehicle owners who need quick liquidity but want to keep driving their car
Borrowers seeking personalized, in-person service with transparent terms explained clearly
People rejected by traditional banks and seeking alternative same-day lending
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best for consumers in financial emergencies with bad credit who own vehicles and need $100–$2,000 fast. The main caveat is that title loans carry high interest rates (not disclosed on website) and create default risk if borrowers cannot repay; this is a high-cost emergency option, not a sustainable solution. Verify APR and terms carefully before committing.
services: Car title loans ($100–$2,000 quick emergency loans)
Personal loans with no collateral required
In-person loan processing at Memphis location
Same-day or next-day funding upon approval
Customer retention of vehicle during loan term
Competitive rate matching for regional finance customers
